Validate: Required Input.description: Verify that an input string has been provided

Validate: Blank Text (Whitespace).description: Verify that a string isn't blank (whitespace only). Requires "strings" package.

body: ${4:fmt.Println("error: input must be between ${2:5} and ${3:10} bytes long")}
Validate: Min/Max Length (Bytes).description: Verify that a string contains a certain number of bytes

body: ${4:fmt.Println("error: input must be between ${2:5} and ${3:10} characters long")}
Validate: Min/Max Length (Characters).description: Verify that a string contains a certain number of characters (Runes). Requires "unicode/utf8" package.

Validate: String Has Prefix.description: Verify a string starts with a specific prefix. Requires "strings" package.

Validate: String Has Suffix.description: Verify a string ends with a specific suffix. Requires "strings" package.

Validate: String Contains.description: Verify a string contains a specific substring. Requires "strings" package.

body: ${2:fmt.Println("error: input must only contain Cyrillic characters")}
Validate: Unicode Character Range.description: Verify a string only contains characters in a certain unicode range.

Validate: Email Address.description: Sanity check email format and character limits. Requires "regexp" package.

body: ${4:fmt.Println("error: must begin with http or https")}
Validate: URL Absolute.description: Verify absolute HTTP/HTTPS URL syntax. Requires "net/url" package.

Validate: Integer Bounds & Steps.description: Verify integer data string boundaries and steps. Requires "strconv" package.

Validate: Float Bounds.description: Verify float constraints from a string. Requires "strconv" package.

body: ${4:fmt.Printf("error: date is not within valid range")}
Validate: Date.description: Verify standard YYYY-MM-DD string format input. Requires "time" package.

body: ${6:fmt.Printf("error: datetime is not within valid range")}
Validate: Datetime-Local With Location.description: Verify string formats against a specific IANA timezone. Requires "time" package.

body: ${5:fmt.Printf("error: value does not match allowed options")}
Validate: One-in-a-Set (Radio/Select).description: Verify an input string matches a value inside a pre-defined set.

Validate: Many-in-a-Set (Slice elements).description: Iterate over a slice of strings and check that all elements live inside the valid option set.

Validate: Boolean Toggle/Checkbox.description: Verify a standalone boolean state is true.
